title: Cobblemon Visual Tweaks
description: a collection of visual tweaks in cobblemon, only squirtle and charizard and pikachu. cobblemon 1.7+ only
body:
- note 1: V3 recommended until the pikachu line is complete. for now use better caps. https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-caps
- note 2: personal use is fine, and if i don't wanna do it myself, i'm likely to approve a fork. in the event of an early fork (before 1 year of full release) i will have partial ownership. if you're exclusively making a sona/player model: personal use is explicitly allowed. this includes uploading to figura servers and such. just keep in mind: i'm not sure if your sona will be exclusive to you because of my license. it's discouraged to copy sonas, i'm just talking about the license. please lock your avatars if you're able should you not want to share your sona.
- in the event of incompatibility with a squirtle glasses model please reach out. the next model i'm wanting to try brainstorming is revamped blackglasses squirtle, and if people would like to include ribbon's ash's squirtle i don't want to prevent that, especially when the model already exists in a mildly outdated form. sorry for not realizing this sooner. after it's fully open source this will be solved as forks will be allowed.
- **issue page**: https://git.gay/CloverSys/Cobblemon-Visual-Tweaks/issues (or just discord page in the cobblemon server)

- 1.7+
- contains:
- CREDIT: [cobblemon team](https://modrinth.com/organization/cobbled-studios) license: https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/blob/master/LICENSE?ref_type=heads (Creative Commons Attribtuion NonCommercial) EXTENDED CREDIT: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1_lM2ORt5RvpA8bcNrOuHaWWL9E3E6rQ6-pGGXM4LzT8
1. charizard nose tweak (in gallery) model: Reisen/maashous
2. squirtle line circle glasses tweak (in gallery) model: Reisen/maashous
3. pikachu line cap tweak CREDIT: model: Reisen/maashous/Village/Brotat hat: [RedRibbonz](https://modrinth.com/user/RedRibbonz) license: (MIT) https://spdx.org/licenses/MIT.html https://opensource.org/license/mit/

Q/A:
- why was ___ removed? because i don't prefer using it. if i ever remove a tweak i'll make sure it's open source first (or give away the project). exceptions to this in the events of remodels.

- what are the priorities? 0. resource pack compatibility + updating model bases 1. datapack compatibility + open source + raichu (see below. might happen early.)

- permissions: modrinth modpack? yes* only conditions: credit with link (usually it links automatically for modpacks iirc).

- *permissions subject to change until a year passes in which case see below. unlikely to restrict most forms of usage in practice.

- V4+ (in effect after 1 year of the upload of full non-beta/alpha release of V4 for ALL VERSIONS INCLUDING BETA/ALPHA): https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.en (summary) https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode.en (full) note: not a lawyer. modrinth modpacks download directly from this page, so modpacks are good. servers do not distribute the datapacks, so they're fine too in the event of a fork to a datapack as long as they don't distribute the resource packs directly from the server. technicalities: in order to put a fork in a modpack with an incompatible license you must upload a fork seperately on modrinth, then put said fork in a modpack. in the event any of this is incorrect please notify me.

- license for V3 and below 1 year after release: you don't need two seperate license files that say the same thing. just the cobblemon one is fine. no additional restrictions. free to fork reupload whatever, follow the license below.
- cobblemon original asset license [https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/blob/master/LICENSE?ref_type=heads](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/blob/master/LICENSE?ref_type=heads)
